general_ai.name: ZENTRA General AI
general_ai.role: General knowledge, programming, reasoning, system building and internal intelligence

academia_ai.name: ZENTRA Academia AI
academia_ai.role: Decomposition, competitor analysis, equipment extraction and arsenal building

intel_ai.name: ZENTRA Intel AI
intel_ai.role: Economic intelligence, decision systems and productizable modules

sources.reason: Used to improve reasoning, tool use, assistant logic and programming capability
Used to understand multimodal, long-context and ecosystem design patterns
Chart, screener, alert, signal and watchlist equipment can become Financial Trade modules
Research, data, news, analytics and portfolio workflow can strengthen Intel AI and Gate Market
Used for alerting, distribution and founder reports; not necessarily sold as product
Support, ticketing, handoff and customer memory can become Assistant OS equipment
Used to improve cockpit, navigation, user flow and ecosystem interface
Relevant to Banking OS, Tasarruf OS and Islamic Finance OS
Kept as future expansion intelligence; productized only when ZENTRA path is stable
